Variables.Name: LinearDeltaThresholdSq
Variables.Description: max squared position difference to perform velocity adjustment

Variables.Name: LinearInterpAlpha
Variables.Description: strength of snapping to desired linear velocity

Variables.Name: LinearRecipFixTime
Variables.Description: inverted duration after which linear velocity adjustment will fix error

Variables.Name: AngularDeltaThreshold
Variables.Description: max squared angle difference (in radians) to perform velocity adjustment

Variables.Name: AngularInterpAlpha
Variables.Description: strength of snapping to desired angular velocity

Variables.Name: AngularRecipFixTime
Variables.Description: inverted duration after which angular velocity adjustment will fix error

Variables.Name: BodySpeedThresholdSq
Variables.Description: min squared body speed to perform velocity adjustment
